doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), misattributes pre-EDPB guidance, and advances a radical legal position on pseudonymized data falling outside GDPR scope that contradicts established interpretations, indicating it is entirel
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document is dated March 2026 (in the future), references a non-existent EDPB technical workshop in October 2025, misattributes "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB did not exist until 2018; the referenced anonymization guidance was a WP29 opinion), and its substantive position—that pseudonymized data falls entirely outside GDPR material scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established EDPB/CJEU interpretations and is far more radical than any real guidance the Board has issued.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), misattributes pre-EDPB guidance, and advances a radical legal position on pseudonymized data falling outside GDPR scope that contradicts established interpretations, indicating it is entirely invented.
